q1_english_question: I want to apply for a personal loan. What are the main requirements?
q2_english_question: I am a permanent employee with a monthly salary.
q3_english_question: Around 20 million rupiah, with a 12-month tenor.

q1_english_question: I want motorcycle financing. What should I prepare?
q2_english_question: A new motorcycle, and I do not want the installment to be more than 1.5 million rupiah.
q3_english_question: Is a small down payment possible?

q1_english_question: I will pay this week. Please do not count it as late yet.
q2_english_question: If I pay on Friday, can the penalty be removed?
q3_english_question: Okay, send me safe payment options.

q1_english_question: My salary is delayed. Can the installment be moved by a few days?
q2_english_question: It is not that I do not want to pay. I am just waiting for payroll.
q3_english_question: If I cannot pay the full amount yet, can I make a partial payment?

q1_english_question: I am an online ride-hailing driver. My income is not fixed. Can I apply for a loan?
q2_english_question: Some days orders are busy and some days they are quiet. I am afraid I will be considered unable to pay.
q3_english_question: Can I send a screenshot from the app?

q1_english_question: I own a small food stall, but I do not have a salary slip. Can I still apply?
q2_english_question: It has been running for 3 years, with turnover around 1 million rupiah per day.
q3_english_question: I need 10 million rupiah to add stock.

q1_english_question: I want to check the loan limit, with a 12-month tenor. What is the approximate interest?
q2_english_question: I need 30 million rupiah, and an affordable monthly payment is around 3 million.
q3_english_question: If it is pre-approved, is disbursement guaranteed?

q1_english_question: Can I top up the loan if there is still outstanding balance?
q2_english_question: I was late once, but I paid it off that same month.
q3_english_question: If I settle earlier, is there a discount?

q1_english_question: Is taking a loan safe? I am afraid of getting trapped in installments.

q3_english_question: I also have a motorcycle installment of 900 thousand rupiah.

q1_english_question: Why are there so many admin fees? It makes me not want to apply.
q2_english_question: If the admin fee is deducted from the disbursement, does that mean I receive less money?
q3_english_question: Okay, so I should ask for the details first.

q1_english_question: My penalty is wrong. I want to speak with an officer, not a bot.

q3_english_question: If it has not been approved yet, what happens to this month's bill?

q2_english_question: They know my name and part of my contract number.
q3_english_question: Please connect me to a human.

q1_english_question: Yes sir, I will pay this week, but I do not have the funds yet. Can I be given some time first?

q1_english_question: I want to apply for a loan, but my income is uncertain. What should I do?
q2_english_question: I do freelance design, and the amount is different every month.
q3_english_question: If documents are missing, will it definitely be rejected?

q1_english_question: I want to borrow money, but I am afraid the admin fee will be high. How much will the installment be?
q2_english_question: For example, 15 million rupiah, and not more than 1.5 million per month.
q3_english_question: If the result is expensive, I will skip it.

q1_english_question: I can only pay after my sales money comes in, maybe at the end of the week. Can you wait?
q2_english_question: If I inform you now, will it avoid being marked late?
q3_english_question: Then record that I will pay on Saturday.

q1_english_question: I have a small business and want to borrow to add stock. What documents are needed?

q1_english_question: My credit history is bad. Is there a way to still get approved?

q3_english_question: Then what can I do?

q1_english_question: What percentage is the interest? Do not let it change later, or I will complain.

q1_english_question: I want a loan for home renovation. What needs to be checked first?
q2_english_question: Around 25 million rupiah, with an 18-month tenor.
q3_english_question: Permanent salary, around 8 million rupiah.

q1_english_question: Before applying, what documents are usually needed?

q3_english_question: If there is no salary slip, is a bank statement enough?

q3_english_question: What if I am late because the harvest is delayed?

q1_english_question: I sell food online. Can I borrow money for raw materials?

q1_english_question: My credit score is decent. Can I immediately get a high limit?

q3_english_question: I want fast approval.

q1_english_question: What is the difference between flat rate and effective rate?

q1_english_question: The simulation includes an insurance fee. Is it mandatory or optional?

q3_english_question: If it is heavy, I will just cancel.

q1_english_question: I want early settlement. Can I speak with an officer for the official calculation?

q3_english_question: Okay, do not estimate it from the bot.
